package.name: cobot280_moveit_task
package.description: Minimal MoveIt 2 motion task for the myCobot 280: moves the arm through a sequence of goals (named pose home -> named pose ready -> explicit joint goal -> named pose home) using MoveGroupInterface. Designed to be the first custom MoveIt code in this repo, runnable on top of automaticaddison's mycobot_gazebo + mycobot_moveit_config stack.
